use_cases: Displaying user profile pictures in lists, tables, or cards
Representing user identity in notification or message components
Showing author or contributor avatars in content feeds
Displaying customer avatars in e-commerce order management
User identification in admin dashboards or team management interfaces
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based Avatar component with Image and Fallback subcomponents. Displays circular user profile images with automatic fallback to initials or placeholder when images fail to load. Uses Tailwind for styling with a clean, minimal design that integrates seamlessly into any data table, card, or list component.
